result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's what was added to `Main.scala`:

- **`status`** — prints staged files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified files
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from a commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD to a commit without touching the working directory
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and file list with two-space indentation
